stories.title: Reid's early NFL mock draft for next year: Which 2...
stories.summary: We're still a full year out, but let's make way-too-early predictions for every first-round pick of the 2027 NFL draft. Will Arch Manning go No. 1? Jeremiah Smith?

stories.title: Wall becomes Howard's prez of basketball ops
stories.summary: Five-time NBA All-Star John Wall has become the president of basketball operations at Howard University, returning to Washington to partner with the top-ranked HBCU in the country, school officials told ESPN.

stories.title: LIV establishes new board in attempt to survive
stories.summary: With Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund pulling its funding after the 2026 season, the LIV Golf League has established a new independent board as it attempts to survive as a "diversified, multi-partner investment model," the league announced Thursday.

stories.title: Source: Amid LIV unrest, players exploring return
stories.summary: Amid uncertainty about the Saudi-backed tour's future, multiple representatives for LIV Golf players have started to reach out to the PGA Tour to explore what a path back would look like, a source told ESPN on Wednesday.

stories.title: Rioux, college hoops' tallest player, to UC Irvine...
stories.summary: Olivier Rioux, who at 7-foot-9 is the tallest player in college basketball history and the tallest player to score in a Division I game, has committed to play for UC Irvine.
